implemented: Thumbnail-based visual add-slide gallery in the Deck/Actions pane.
Load/Add behavior layered over existing data-preset handlers.
Top-toolbar Add routed to the visual add-slide gallery, with legacy Add as new slide still available in the deck action panel.
Thumbnail-based theme picker in the Design workflow, layered over existing data-style-preset handlers.
Stage 38D diagnostics: window.__LUMINA_STAGE38D_STATUS, window.__LUMINA_STAGE38D_TESTS, window.LuminaStage38D, and stage38DVisualGalleryStatus in copied reports.

browserSmoke.note: Direct headless Chromium --dump-dom did not return DOM output within the container timeout. Static syntax and marker checks passed; browser validation should be done on deployed GitHub Pages with the diagnostic report.
